task_completion.description: Navigate to the search functionality within the ArkCase application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase application is open with the search bar, search page, or advanced search interface visible.

task_completion.description: Input the specific 'Project Blue Sky' code phrase into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phrase 'Project Blue Sky' (followed by a unique ID/UUID) is typed into a search input box in the ArkCase GUI.

task_completion.description: Execute the search and view the results matching the code phrase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search results page or dropdown in ArkCase is visible, displaying at least one Complaint case that matches the search query.

task_completion.description: Locate and identify the Case ID of the matching Complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific Complaint case is opened to its details page, or the Case ID is clearly visible and highlighted/selected within the search results.

task_completion.description: Save the identified Case ID to the required output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open showing the Case ID being written to or saved in a file named '/home/ga/found_case_id.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase graphical user interface to perform the search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ArkCase web interface (search bars, buttons, result lists) rather than terminal commands querying Solr or backend databases directly.

integrity.description: The Case ID was obtained from actual search results in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Case ID being saved matches the Case ID shown in the ArkCase GUI search results or case details page.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output to the exact requested file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal explicitly shows the file path '/home/ga/found_case_id.txt' being created or written to, not a different directory or filename.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/found_case_id.txt'. The search phrase will consist of 'Project Blue Sky' followed by an 8-character UUID. The application being used is ArkCase, which has a GUI for searching cases.
